chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm the Le Clam assistant 👋 How can I help you?
chatbot.themes: Here are the most popular topics:
chatbot.perfect: Great, don't hesitate to come back if needed. Happy shopping at Le Clam! 🛒
chatbot.redirect_support: I'm redirecting you to our support form. An advisor will reply within 24h.
chatbot.no_answer: I don't have a direct answer to that. Our team can help you!
chatbot.ans_delivery: Orders are dispatched within 1–3 business days. Delivery then takes 3–5 days within metropolitan France. You will receive an email with your tracking number as soon as it ships.
chatbot.ans_returns: You have 14 days from receipt to return an item. It must be unused and in its original packaging. Refunds are processed within 5 days of receiving the return.
chatbot.ans_payment: We accept: credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), PayPal, bank transfer, SEPA direct debit and cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, USDT). All payments are secure.
chatbot.ans_tracking: Your tracking number is emailed to you as soon as your order ships. You can also find it in 'My orders' on your account and track your parcel on our tracking page.
chatbot.ans_promo: Discount codes are applied on the payment page, in the "Referral / promo code" field. Your referral code can be found in your Referral area (accessible from your account).
chatbot.ans_account: You can create an account or log in by clicking "My account" in the navigation. If you forget your password, use the "Forgot password?" link on the login page.
chatbot.ans_contact: Our team is available by message via your customer area (in the "Support" section). We respond within 24–48h (business days). You can also email us at contact@leclam.eu.
chatbot.ans_stock: Availability is shown on each product page. If out of stock, the "Add" button is disabled. Check back regularly — restocks are frequent.
chatbot.ans_birthday: If you entered your date of birth in your profile, you automatically receive a −€10 code on your birthday.
chatbot.ans_bundle: Product packs are shown at the bottom of category pages. They group several items at a reduced price. The discount is shown on each pack.

review.title: Your review
review.success_text: Your rating has been recorded. It will appear on the product page.
review.used_text: You have already reviewed this product.
review.invalid_text: This link has expired or is incorrect.

aide.title: Help & Requests
aide.sub: Looking for a specific product? Have a question? We're here.
aide.request_sub: Can't find an item on the site? Describe it to us and we'll do our best to source it.
aide.offre_sub: Seen a product elsewhere and want us to find it for you? Send us a photo, we'll source it!
aide.success_request: Request sent! We'll reply within 48h to your email address.
aide.success_offre: Request sent! We're searching for your product and will reply within 48h.
aide.faq_a1: Orders are processed within 24h. Delivery then takes 5 to 10 business days depending on your address and the product. You will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number as soon as your order is dispatched.
aide.faq_a2: Yes! You have 30 days from receipt to return any unused item in its original packaging. Refunds are processed within 5 to 7 business days after we receive your return.
aide.faq_q3: How does the Bébé section work?
aide.faq_a3: The Bébé section offers second-hand and new items selected manually. Stock is limited (often 1 unit). Once sold, it is automatically removed. You can submit a request via this form if you are looking for something specific.
aide.faq_q4: How can I change or cancel my order?
aide.faq_a4: You can change or cancel your order from the "My orders" page as long as it has not yet been dispatched. Once dispatched, contact our support team via the order details page.
aide.faq_a5: Yes, all payments are processed via Stripe, one of the most secure payment systems in the world. Your banking details are never stored on our servers.

mentions.director_body: The publication director is the legal representative of Le Clam.
mentions.hosting_body:
This site is hosted by:
Vercel Inc.
340 Pine Street, Suite 701 — San Francisco, CA 94104, United States
vercel.com
mentions.ip_body: All elements of this website (texts, images, graphics, logo, icons, sounds, software…) are the exclusive property of Le Clam or its partners. Any reproduction, representation, modification or exploitation, in whole or in part, is prohibited without prior written authorisation.
mentions.links_body: This site may contain links to third-party websites. Le Clam cannot be held responsible for the content of these sites or any damages resulting from their use.
mentions.law_body: These legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, the courts of Paris shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

cgv.art1_body: These General Terms and Conditions of Sale govern the contractual relationship between Le Clam and any customer wishing to make a purchase on the leclam.eu website. Any purchase implies unreserved acceptance of these terms.
cgv.art2_body: The products offered are those listed on the site at the time of the order. Le Clam reserves the right to modify the range at any time. Photographs and descriptions are provided for information purposes only and are not contractually binding.
cgv.art3_body: Prices are shown in euros including VAT. Le Clam reserves the right to change its prices at any time, it being understood that the applicable price is that shown at the time the order is confirmed.
cgv.art4_li1: Product selection and addition to the cart
cgv.art4_li2: Cart validation and entry of contact details
cgv.art4_end: A confirmation email is sent to the address provided at the time of the order.
cgv.art5_body: Payment is made online by credit card (Visa, Mastercard), PayPal or Apple Pay, via the secure Stripe platform. Banking data is never stored on our servers.
cgv.art6_body: Orders are processed within 24 business hours. The estimated delivery time is 5 to 10 business days depending on the destination. These times are indicative and may vary during peak periods.
cgv.art7_body: In accordance with Article L.221-18 of the French Consumer Code, you have 30 days from receipt of your order to exercise your right of withdrawal, without having to give a reason. Return costs are borne by the customer unless otherwise stated.
cgv.art8_body: All our products benefit from the legal warranty of conformity (art. L.217-4 et seq. of the Consumer Code) and the warranty against hidden defects (art. 1641 et seq. of the Civil Code).
cgv.art9_body: Le Clam cannot be held liable for indirect damages related to the use of the products. Our liability is limited to the amount of the relevant order.
cgv.art10_body: In the event of a dispute, an amicable solution will be sought first. Failing that, the courts of Paris will have sole jurisdiction. You may also use the European Commission's online dispute resolution platform.

privacy.s1_body: Le Clam, sole trader, is the controller of your personal data collected via the website leclam.eu. Contact: contact@leclam.eu
privacy.s2_intro: In the context of your purchases and browsing, we may collect:
privacy.s2_li1: Name, first name, email address, postal address, telephone number (when placing an order)
privacy.s2_li2: Payment data (processed directly by Stripe, to which we have no access)
privacy.s2_li3: Browsing data (pages visited, session duration, via analytics cookies)
privacy.s2_li4: Cart contents (stored in your browser via localStorage)
privacy.s3_li2: Send you confirmations and order-related information
privacy.s4_body: Processing is based on: the performance of the sales contract (orders), your consent (newsletter, analytics cookies) and our legal obligations.
privacy.s5_body: Your order data is retained for 3 years from the last commercial relationship. Browsing data is retained for a maximum of 13 months.
privacy.s6_intro: Your data may be shared with:
privacy.s6_li2: Carriers: for the delivery of your orders
privacy.s6_li3: Dropshipping suppliers: for order preparation and fulfilment
privacy.s6_end: No data is sold to third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.s7_intro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy.s7_li1: Access: view the data we hold about you
privacy.s7_li3: Erasure: request the deletion of your data
privacy.s7_li5: Portability: receive your data in a structured format
privacy.s7_end: To exercise these rights: contact@leclam.eu. You may also file a complaint with the CNIL (French data protection authority) (cnil.fr).
privacy.s8_body: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, loss or disclosure.

ck.what_body: A cookie is a small text file placed on your browser when you visit our site. It enables information about your browsing to be remembered and improves your experience.
ck.necessary_body: The leclam_cart cookie (localStorage) is essential for the proper functioning of the shopping cart. It does not require your consent as it does not collect any personally identifiable data.
ck.analytics_body: Analytics cookies (Google Analytics) enable us to understand how visitors interact with our site. These cookies are only placed after your consent via our cookie banner.
ck.manage_intro: You can change your cookie preferences at any time:
ck.manage_li1: Via your browser: each browser allows you to refuse or delete cookies (settings → privacy)
ck.manage_li2: Via our banner: accessible at the bottom of the page on your first visit
ck.manage_li3: Google Analytics: via the opt-out add-on available at tools.google.com
ck.manage_end: Declining analytics cookies does not prevent the use of the site or the shopping cart.

retours.s1_body: In accordance with applicable legislation, you have 30 days from receipt of your order to exercise your right of withdrawal, without having to give a reason.
retours.s2_li1: The product must be in its original condition, unused
retours.s2_li3: The request must be made within 30 days of receipt
retours.s3_body: To initiate a return, contact us at contact@leclam.eu with your order number. We will send you return instructions within 48 hours.
retours.s4_body: Return costs are borne by the customer, except in the case of a defective product or an error on our part.
retours.s5_body: Once the return is received and validated, the refund will be processed within 5 to 10 business days to the original payment method.

livraison.s1_body: All orders are processed within 24 business hours of payment confirmation.
livraison.s2_body: The estimated delivery time is 5 to 10 business days depending on the destination. These times are indicative and may vary during peak periods or depending on the carrier.
livraison.s4_body: Shipping costs are calculated according to the destination and weight. The exact amount is displayed in your cart before any confirmation.
livraison.s5_body: A confirmation email with a tracking number is sent to you as soon as your parcel is dispatched.
livraison.s6_body: In case of a damaged or undelivered parcel, contact us at contact@leclam.eu within 7 days of the expected delivery date.

faq.q1_1: How do I place an order?
faq.a1_1: Add the desired items to your cart, then click "Order". Enter your address and proceed to secure payment. You will receive a confirmation email within minutes of your purchase.
faq.q1_2: Can I modify or cancel my order?
faq.a1_2: You have 2 hours after confirmation to contact us and request a modification or cancellation. After this period, the order is forwarded to our supplier and can no longer be modified. Write to us at contact@leclam.eu.
faq.q1_3: How do I track my order?
faq.a1_3: A tracking number is sent to you by email as soon as your parcel is dispatched. You can track your delivery directly on the carrier's website.
faq.a2_1: Orders are processed within 24 business hours. Delivery then takes 5 to 10 business days depending on your address. These times may vary during peak periods (holidays, sales).
faq.a2_2: We currently deliver to metropolitan France, Belgium and Switzerland. Other destinations will be added soon.
faq.a2_3: Shipping costs are calculated at checkout according to weight and destination. Delivery is free from €50 of purchases.
faq.a3_1: Yes, you have 30 days from receipt to return an item in its original condition. See our Returns page for the full procedure.
faq.q3_2: How long does a refund take?
faq.a3_2: The refund is processed within 5 to 10 business days after receipt and verification of your return, to the payment method used when ordering.
faq.q4_1: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a4_1: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal and Apple Pay. All payments are secured by Stripe.
faq.a4_2: Yes. Transactions are processed by Stripe, certified PCI-DSS level 1. Your banking data never passes through our servers.
faq.q5_1: Are the products consistent with the photos?
faq.a5_1: We do our best to ensure the visuals are accurate. Slight colour differences may appear depending on your screen settings. If in doubt, don't hesitate to contact us before purchasing.
faq.q5_2: An item is out of stock, when will it be available?
faq.a5_2: Write to us at contact@leclam.eu specifying the product in question. We will notify you as soon as it is back in stock.
